title: Greek Beef Stifado
description: A hearty Greek beef stew made with tender beef, onions, garlic, and a rich sauce.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the sliced beef and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Remove the beef from the pan and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil to the pan.
Add the chopped onion and minced garlic and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the beef broth, flour, and optional red wine vinegar to the pan.
Stir to combine and bring to a boil.
Return the browned beef to the pan and simmer for 1 1/2 hours, or until the meat is tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley or dill, if desired.
Optional: stir in the Greek yogurt before serving for a creamy sauce.
